<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\SMS; class SentSMS { /** * @var ?string */ protected $accountRef; /** * @var ?string */ protected $clientRef; /** * @var string */ protected $messageId; /** * @var string */ protected $messagePrice; /** * @var string */ protected $network; /** * @var string */ protected $remainingBalance; /** * @var int */ protected $status; /** * @var string */ protected $to; public function __construct(array $data) { $this->accountRef = $data['account-ref'] ?? null; $this->clientRef = $data['client-ref'] ?? null; $this->to = $data['to']; $this->messageId = $data['message-id']; $this->status = (int)$data['status']; $this->remainingBalance = $data['remaining-balance']; $this->messagePrice = $data['message-price']; $this->network = $data['network']; } public function getAccountRef(): ?string { return $this->accountRef; } public function getClientRef(): ?string { return $this->clientRef; } public function getMessageId(): string { return $this->messageId; } public function getMessagePrice(): string { return $this->messagePrice; } public function getNetwork(): string { return $this->network; } public function getRemainingBalance(): string { return $this->remainingBalance; } public function getStatus(): int { return $this->status; } public function getTo(): string { return $this->to; } }
